B.C. Home ï¿½  Ministry of Citizens' Services ï¿½  Procurement ï¿½  BC Auction
Surplus Asset
BC Auction
Used surplus government assets with bidding access to anyone who has access to the Internet. Assets sold are from various levels of government.
Notice to our valued customers:
For BC Auction bidders who request shipping for their won items, please note that BC Auction is experiencing higher fuel surcharges from our delivery partners. As a result, you may see increased delivery charges.

If you have a specific question about an auction item, please contact the listing agent who will do their best to answer it. Auction viewings are by appointment only. To make an appointment see the information in the Auction Details section. The successful bidders can arrange a time/date to pick up their auction item(s) after payment has been processed.
Please note, BC Auction can only accept online payments for purchases of $9999.99 or less
To schedule an appointment for auction pick up or to arrange a payment of $10,000 or over, contact your nearest location.
Surrey (604) 501-8216
Victoria (250) 952-4439
Prince George (250) 565-4205
Please note - our Checkout Payment Portal has been updated. Please reach out to our BC Auction helpdesk if you require any assistance.
Cash & Carry Sales (onsite sale) Status:
Surrey Mondayï¿½Friday 9:00 am to 3:00 pm
Victoria Fridays 9:00 am to 3:00 pm
Prince George Mondayï¿½Friday
